ABB.description: Electrification, motion, process automation, and robotics. ABB Switzerland holds 75%. Key beneficiary of India's power T&D upgrade cycle, railways electrification, and green hydrogen projects.

BOSCHLTD.name: Bosch India
BOSCHLTD.description: Robert Bosch GmbH holds 70%. Automotive fuel systems, power tools, and home appliances. Transitioning from diesel fuel injection to EV components, ADAS systems, and hydrogen cell technology.

HONAUT.name: Honeywell Automation
HONAUT.description: Honeywell USA holds 75%. Process automation, building management, safety solutions. Chemical, refining, and pharma industries drive demand. One of the highest-quality small-cap MNCs listed in India.

3MINDIA.name: 3M India
3MINDIA.description: 3M USA holds 75%. Scotch tape, Post-it, safety solutions, healthcare tapes, industrial abrasives. Diversified industrial with thousands of products across segments. Steady royalty model.

BSE.name: BSE Ltd
BSE.description: India's oldest stock exchange, beneficiary of retail investor participation boom. Derivatives volumes surging. GIFT City exchange operations growing. Revenue diversification into insurance and other verticals.

CESC.name: CESC Ltd
CESC.description: Kolkata's dominant power utility. Regulated ROE provides stable base. Surya Vidyut renewable subsidiary growing. Spencer's Retail stake provides consumer exposure.

IRCTC.name: IRCTC
IRCTC.description: Indian Railways' exclusive catering, tourism, and ticketing arm. Internet ticketing monopoly generates massive cash flows. Train travel boom post-COVID. Convenience fee regime restored to full level.

POLICYBZR.name: PB Fintech (Policybazaar)
POLICYBZR.description: India's largest insurance aggregator and credit marketplace. Policybazaar dominates online term and health insurance. Paisabazaar is India's largest credit marketplace. Path to profitability ahead of schedule.

REC.name: REC Ltd
REC.description: Power sector financing PSU benefiting from infrastructure capex. Loan book growing 20%+ with improving asset quality.

CARBORUNIV.name: Carborundum Universal
CARBORUNIV.description: Abrasives and advanced ceramics leader. Industrial cycle recovery driving mid-cap industrial momentum. Export growth to Middle East and Europe.

MANKIND.name: Mankind Pharma
MANKIND.description: Listed 2023. Branded generics across India. Pan-India distribution with 50,000+ outlets. Consumer healthcare brands — Prega News, AcneStar.

NYKAA.name: Nykaa
NYKAA.description: Listed 2021. India's largest beauty and personal care platform. House of brands — Kay Beauty, Nykd. Omnichannel physical + digital.

JSWINFRA.name: JSW Infrastructure
JSWINFRA.description: Listed 2023. India's second-largest private port operator. Mangalore, Goa and Paradip ports. Leveraging JSW Steel captive volumes.

HONASA.name: Honasa Consumer
HONASA.description: Listed 2023. Mamaearth, The Derma Co, Aqualogica brands. Direct-to-consumer personal care with digital marketing capabilities.

SBFC.name: SBFC Finance
SBFC.description: Listed 2023. MSME-focused secured lender. Small business loans with gold loan component. Growing rural and semi-urban credit book.

GODIGIT.name: Godigit Insurance
GODIGIT.description: Listed 2024. India's fastest growing general insurer. Digital-first motor and health insurance platform.

OLAELECTRIC.name: Ola Electric
OLAELECTRIC.description: Listed 2024. India's largest EV scooter maker. S1 platform with Ola Gig B2B electric scooter for delivery partners.

THERMAX.name: Thermax
THERMAX.description: Energy and environment engineering. Boilers, heat exchangers, chillers. Green hydrogen equipment for industrial decarbonisation.

CGPOWER.name: CG Power
CGPOWER.description: Transformers, switchgear, motors and railway traction systems. Murugappa Group turnaround. Railway electrification boom driving order inflows.

BHEL.name: BHEL
BHEL.description: Bharat Heavy Electricals — India's largest power equipment manufacturer. Makes turbines, generators, transformers and boilers. Government holds 63%. Reviving order book from thermal power and defence electronics diversification.

HINDPETRO.name: Hindustan Petroleum (HPCL)
HINDPETRO.description: India's second-largest public sector oil marketing company. 9,000+ petrol stations with retail fuel marketing advantage. Vizag and Mumbai refineries being upgraded for complex crude processing. Trades at significant discount to replacement cost. Earnings highly cyclical with marketing margins — value opportunity deepens in refining downcycles.

BLUESTAR.name: Blue Star
BLUESTAR.description: Commercial refrigeration and AC player. B2B and B2C mix. Growing channel distribution. Quality mid-cap industrial consumer play.

SCHAEFFLER.name: Schaeffler India
SCHAEFFLER.description: German-parent bearing manufacturer for auto and industrial applications. High ROCE in import-substitute precision engineering. Mid-cap industrial quality anchor.
